name: Coursera
description: Coursera is an online learning platform offering courses, specializations, and degrees from top universities and companies. Its Catalog API provides public read access to the course catalog, instructor profiles, and partner institutions. Useful for searching and browsing educational content programmatically.

capabilities.name: courses_list
capabilities.description: List all courses in the Coursera catalog with optional pagination and field selection.

capabilities.name: courses_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific course by its ID or slug.

capabilities.name: courses_search
capabilities.description: Search the Coursera course catalog by keyword, topic, or skill.

capabilities.name: courses_get_by_slug
capabilities.description: Look up a specific course using its URL slug identifier.

capabilities.name: instructors_list
capabilities.description: List all instructors in the Coursera catalog with pagination and field selection.

capabilities.name: instructors_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed profile information for a specific instructor by their ID.

capabilities.name: partners_list
capabilities.description: List all partner institutions (universities and companies) that offer courses on Coursera.

capabilities.name: partners_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific partner institution by its ID.

capabilities.name: specializations_list
capabilities.description: List all specializations (multi-course sequences) with optional filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: specializations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific specialization by its ID.
